north_star.statement: Users can rely on the feature in production without hidden correctness gaps.
north_star.score_formula: weighted required passing target rows / weighted required target rows

convergence_style.why: This example behaves like the Greenmark PDF-to-warehouse comparison: exact values matter, but small rounding variance is acceptable.

available_styles.exact_match: Probe must equal target or match a strict expected output.
available_styles.tolerance_band: Probe must stay inside an explicit acceptable band.
available_styles.staged_maturity: Targets move through maturity stages before being considered done.
available_styles.regression_hardening: Previously passing rows must not fall back without an intentional target change.
available_styles.drift_homeostasis: Freshness and environment monitors must stay healthy.
available_styles.exploratory_narrowing: Each iteration must eliminate hypotheses or reduce uncertainty.
available_styles.consensus_evidence: Multiple independent evidence paths must agree.
available_styles.graceful_degradation: Critical behavior must survive partial failures with explicit degraded modes.

iteration_policy.loop: target -> attempt -> score -> audit -> repair -> re-score
iteration_policy.repair_selection: smallest failing row that moves the north star
iteration_policy.stop_condition: all required target rows pass, or every non-pass row is blocked with owner, evidence, and next action

scoreboard.evidence: Route exists and is linked from navigation.

scoreboard.next_action: Add a deterministic test for the main happy path and one error path.

scoreboard.evidence: Not required for current north star.

invariants.statement: Failed writes must return an explicit error path.

rows.cause: Example small miss: warehouse probe under target by more than tolerance.
rows.next_action: Investigate missing April source rows or filtering differences.
Confirm whether the probe command reached the target environment.

drift_monitors.assumption: The example route remains part of the production navigation contract.
The eligibility test still covers the real allow/deny rule.
drift_monitors.trigger: Eligibility requirements or auth model changes.

regression_history.cause: Example regression entry showing how Converge remembers pass-to-fail transitions.
regression_history.next_action: Restore deterministic route tests and keep them in the target lattice.

iteration_ledger.hypothesis: Declaring the route and linking it from navigation creates the first stable target row.

biology_patterns.converge_rule: Track acceptable target bands and correct deviations.
Promote recurring failures into durable invariants.
AI proposes repair hypotheses; checks decide what survives.
Retire obsolete or harmful targets instead of patching forever.

repair_ledger.smallest_next_repair: Write the missing tests before changing implementation.
